care.summary: Giant cultivar of peace lily with oversized glossy leaves and elegant white spathes.
care.water: Keep evenly moist; droops when thirsty
care.toxicity: Toxic to cats and dogs if ingested
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from fluoride in water
Failure to flower in low light
tips: Use distilled or rainwater to prevent brown tips
Wipe leaves monthly to keep glossy
One of the best low-light plants
